property.name: include
property.value: Map:Common Data

property.name: image
property.value: Couch Cliffs map.png

properties.property: A stale wind... you stifle a sneeze. You are filled with the power of not sneezing.

property.name: page
property.value: SAVE Point

properties.property: 一阵污浊的风吹过...你强忍住了喷嚏。 你充满了强忍喷嚏的力量。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 暗世界

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 存檔點#存檔點列表|存档点

property.name: description
property.value: [[Susie]] and [[Ralsei]] occupy the left and right switches respectively. [[Kris]] must press the middle switch to unlock the way forward.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: [[Susie]] 和 [[Ralsei]] 分别占据了左右两个开关。[[Kris]]必须按下中间的开关来解锁前进的路。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 眼睛谜题

property.name: description
property.value: The [[party]] must simultaneously step on the highlighted pressure plates to unlock the way forward. Here, the order of appearance is ''right'', ''bottom and left'', ''bottom and right''.

property.name: page
property.value: TV World/Puzzles#The clock puzzle

property.name: zh_description
property.value: [[小队]]必须同时踩下发光眼睛的按钮以解锁前进的路。这里,按钮的排序为右,左下,右下.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 钟表谜题

property.name: description
property.value: After [[Kris]] creates a [[Dark Fountain]] in the [[Dreemurr residence]] living room, they and [[Susie]] wake up in the Couch Cliffs. Susie declares this to be another adventure, and the two continue forward.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 在 [[Kris]] 在[[Dreemurr 家]]客厅内创建了一个[[黑暗喷泉]]后,他和[[Susie]]在沙发悬崖上醒来,Susie宣称说这将是另外一场冒险,并且两人继续向前.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 醒来

property.name: description
property.value: Wait for about 10 seconds to see and hear [[zapper]]_outline sneeze once.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 等待10秒钟可以看到且听到[[zapper]]_outline打了一个喷嚏.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 打喷嚏

property.name: description
property.value: [[Ralsei]] reunites with [[Kris]] and [[Susie]] after sensing the [[Dark World]]'s creation. The three pose together and continue forward.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 在感知到[[暗世界]]的创建后,[[Ralsei]] 与 [[Kris]] 和 [[Susie]] 重聚,三人摆了一个姿势然后继续向前.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: Ralsei 重新加入小队

property.name: description
property.value: [[Susie]] tells [[Ralsei]] about some of the movies she watched on TV. Ralsei admits that he has never watched a movie before.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: [[Susie]] 告诉 [[Ralsei]] 一些有关她在TV上看到的影片.Ralsei承认说他之前从未看过一部影片.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 与 Ralsei交谈, part 1

property.name: description
property.value: [[Susie]] asks [[Ralsei]] if he would want to watch movies with her and [[Kris]]. Ralsei hesitantly agrees that it would be nice.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: [[Susie]] 询问 [[Ralsei]] 他是否想要与她和[[kris]]一起看电影,Ralsei迟疑地认可了,说那会很美好的.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 与 Ralsei交谈, part 2

property.name: description
property.value: [[Susie]] suggests that [[Ralsei]] come to [[school]] with her and [[Kris]] so that he could do their homework. Ralsei appreciates the offer.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: [[Susie]] 提议让 [[Ralsei]] 和她和[[Kris]]一起来学校，这样他就可以帮他们做作业了。Ralsei 赞赏了这个建议。.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 与 Ralsei交谈, part 3

property.name: description
property.value: [[Susie]] suggests that [[Ralsei]] should go to the Festival with her and [[Kris]].

property.name: zh_description
property.value: [[Susie]] 提议 [[Ralsei]] 应该与她和[[Kris]]一起去过节.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 与 Ralsei交谈, part 4

property.name: description
property.value: A [[Shuttah]] hand plays a camera sound effect when the [[party]] slides past.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 当[[小队]]滑过时，一只[[Shuttah]]的手发出了一声照相机音效。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 说 茄子

property.name: description
property.value: [[Ralsei]] says that he would love to go to the Festival.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: [[Ralsei]] 说他会喜欢去节日的。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 与 Ralsei交谈, part 5

property.name: description
property.value: [[Ralsei]] explains that he is appreciative of [[Susie]]'s offer. He starts saying something else, but is hesitant to continue.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: [[Ralsei]] 解释说他赞赏[[Susie]]的邀请。他开始转移话题，但是犹豫不决地继续。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 与 Ralsei交谈, part 6

property.name: description
property.value: [[Ralsei]] explains that, due to the nature of being a [[Darkner]], he cannot enter the [[Light World]] with [[Kris]] and [[Susie]]. He explains that Darkners are simply inanimate objects given form by the [[Dark Fountain]]s, and the [[Dark World]]s are illusions brought about by removing light. Susie objects to Ralsei's claim that Darkners are not real, reaffirming their friendship.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: [[Ralsei]] 解释道，由于他是一个[[暗之民]]，他不能跟着[[kris]]和[[Susie]]一起进入光世界。他还解释说，暗之民仅仅是由[[黑暗喷泉]]赋予了形体的无生命物品，而暗世界是将光移除后的幻想。Susie反对Ralsei关于暗之民不是真实的的断言，并重申了他们的友谊。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 与 Ralsei交谈, part 7

property.name: description
property.value: [[Tenna]] interrupts [[Susie]] and [[Ralsei]]'s conversation and introduces himself as a game show host. He declares his desire to subject the [[party]] to his games.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: [[Tenna]] 打断了 [[Susie]] 和 [[Ralsei]]的交谈并且开始说明自己是一位游戏节目主持人。他表现出对于让[[小队]]加入他的游戏的渴望。

property.name: zh_name
property.value: Tenna的介绍

property.name: description
property.value: A sleeping couch. If [[Kris]] and [[Susie]] walk past the couch and come back, the couch wakes up and walks to the left. If the [[player]] has a completed [[Chapter 3]] SAVE file, Kris can sleep on the couch; this progresses the plot directly to the first round of ''[[The Legend of Tenna]]''.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一个用来睡觉的沙发.如果[[kris]]和[[Susie]]离开沙发(让沙发处于屏幕外)然后再回来,沙发会醒来并且慢慢的往左边挪.如果玩家有一份[[第三章]]的已完成存档,kris可以在沙发上睡觉,这会将剧情直接推进到''[[Tenna 传说]]''第一轮之前.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 沙发

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 沙发

property.name: description
property.value: A Dust Pile. Can be destroyed when interacted with.

property.name: page
property.value: Dust Pile

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一个 灰尘堆.可以通过与其交互来摧毁.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 灰尘堆

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 灰尘堆

property.name: description
property.value: A Dust Pile. Can be destroyed when interacted with.

property.name: page
property.value: Dust Pile

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一个 灰尘堆.可以通过与其交互来摧毁.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 灰尘堆

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 灰尘堆

property.name: description
property.value: A Dust Pile. Can be destroyed when interacted with.

property.name: page
property.value: Dust Pile

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一个 灰尘堆.可以通过与其交互来摧毁.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 灰尘堆

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 灰尘堆

property.name: description
property.value: A Dust Pile. Can be destroyed when interacted with.

property.name: page
property.value: Dust Pile

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一个 灰尘堆.可以通过与其交互来摧毁.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 灰尘堆

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 灰尘堆

property.name: description
property.value: A Dust Pile. Can be destroyed when interacted with.

property.name: page
property.value: Dust Pile

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一个 灰尘堆.可以通过与其交互来摧毁.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 灰尘堆

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 灰尘堆

property.name: description
property.value: A Dust Pile. Can be destroyed when interacted with.

property.name: page
property.value: Dust Pile

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一个 灰尘堆.可以通过与其交互来摧毁.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 灰尘堆

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 灰尘堆

property.name: description
property.value: A Dust Pile. Can be destroyed when interacted with.

property.name: page
property.value: Dust Pile

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一个 灰尘堆.可以通过与其交互来摧毁.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 灰尘堆

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 灰尘堆

property.name: description
property.value: Susie puts forth the idea that [[Ralsei]] could do any puzzles that she and [[Kris]] may find in the [[Light World]].

property.name: zh_description
property.value: Susie 提出[[Ralsei]]可以解决她和[[Kris]]在[[光世界]]可能找到的任何问题.

property.name: description
property.value: Ralsei directs [[Kris]] to the switch in the middle and advises them to press it.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: Ralsei 指导 [[Kris]] 打开中间的开关,并建议他按下它.

property.name: description
property.value: Treasure chest containing 10 POINTs.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一个包含10点数的宝箱.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 10 点数

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 点数
